scope_note: Task description named 'src/cli.ts' as the dispatcher, but src/cli.ts is a 6-line shim that re-imports bin/roadmap.ts — the real router. Treated bin/roadmap.ts as the moral equivalent (intent: delete the spec subcommand entirely from the CLI). Same for downstream surface (schemas.ts, api-enforcement.ts, cli-human.ts) which all referenced the four spec.plan* commands and would have broken pnpm run check if not updated.
tests_audit: tests/api-command.test.ts asserted commands.length === 10 and spec.plan* presence — updated to assert spec.plan* absence and dropped the brittle count. tests/cli-intake-enforcement.test.ts had two refs to 'roadmap spec plan' workflow strings in error-message assertions; rewrote both to match the new spec-pipeline-free fix copy ('tasks[]', 'roadmap make').

verify.summary: tsc --noEmit clean; 595 tests pass across 31 files (one obsolete test file, advance-feature-branch.test.ts, was already deleted by a parallel agent).

verify_help.note: OK: no match — 'spec' line removed from help text.

notes: Removed the entire spec subcommand surface: the 309-LOC src/cli/spec.ts CLI module, the dispatch case + import + KNOWN_COMMANDS/NOTE_EXEMPT entries + deriveEnvelopeCmd/deriveSchemaKey 'spec' branches + 3 plan-* human renderer registrations in bin/roadmap.ts, the four spec.plan* schema entries (43 LOC) in src/lib/schemas.ts, the spec.plan* entries in CANONICAL_COMMANDS in src/lib/api-enforcement.ts, and the renderPlanGallery/renderPlanSelect/renderPlanStatus + GalleryData/PlanSelectData/PlanStatusData exports (88 LOC) in src/lib/cli-human.ts. Also rewrote the 'roadmap spec plan --from <requirements.md>' fix-text breadcrumbs in src/cli/advance.ts and src/cli/make.ts (which would have pointed users at a non-existent command). All 595 tests pass.
